article_title: Liquor Primary licences for outdoor event venues

briefs.title: Outdoor Event Venues Can Now Apply for a Permanent Liquor Primary Licence Instead of Multiple SEPs
briefs.summary: BC's Liquor and Cannabis Regulation Branch has introduced a permanent Liquor Primary licence option for outdoor event venues, replacing the need to repeatedly apply for Special Event Permits throughout the year.
briefs.action_required: Apply for a permanent LP licence via the liquor and cannabis licensing portal if you currently operate under multiple SEPs.
briefs.article_title: Liquor Primary licences for outdoor event venues
